top_recommendations.impact_statement: Connecting **Naomi** (perception) to **Unnamed** (information) brings a peripheral high-brokerage node into the core coalition. Would open **31 new perception/narrative pathways**. This **reinforces an existing perception coalition** — it connects nodes in a shared value space.
